_comment: Tutorial step 'welcome' as a cinematic (task: 'Frank cinematics should be used for most of the tutorial phases... this is a good place to start adding shop flavor'). Frank slides in sideways from behind the glass card case near the register, rather than the flat horizontal glide-from-offscreen every other scene uses - first thing the player ever sees, so it's the natural place to establish the shop's physical space.

steps.name: Frank
steps.text: Hey! You made it. I'm Frank - I run this place.

steps.name: Frank
steps.text: That the birthday PixBot? Solid starter frame.

steps.name: Frank
steps.text: Corp sponsors our trainer table so new pilots can learn without scratching the paint. Hop on, I'll walk you through it.
